problem id: 7e5b8c12
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(6)

examples:
  01011001 -> 01010110
  00011101 -> 01000111
  11110111 -> 11111101
  00100100 -> 00001001
  00010100 -> 00000101
  10000001 -> 01100000
  01001011 -> 11010010
  10110100 -> 00101101

query: 11000010
predicted answer: 10110000
